product.name: ArWoWear T11 Static Pro
product.titleDescriptor: 99% Cotton 1% Carbon Antistatic Twill Fabric, 360 gr/m'2
descriptions: ArWoWear T11 Static Pro is 360 g/m², 99% cotton 1% carbon workwear antistatic twill fabric.

It is suitable to use on electronic industry where static electric formation is a problem. Oil and gas industry platform workers can also use it to prevent static electric related explosions on dangerous area.
99% Cotton 1% Carbon Antistatic Twill Fabric, 360 gr/m'2
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>1600N; Weft>1000N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>30N; Weft>25N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 2-3 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: It is suitable to use on electronic industry where static electric formation is a problem. Oil and gas industry platform workers can also use it to prevent static electric related explosions on dangerous area.
matches.rationale: Explicit statement that oil and gas industry platform workers use this fabric to prevent static electricity related explosions, directly connecting it to high-hazard electrical/energy sector use.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Antistatic FR-adjacent workwear could plausibly be used in metalworking, but no explicit welding or foundry use is stated.
